curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff and advisory description. The advisory names ACME and SCEP provisioners as affected. The core vulnerability is in UseToken (authority/authorize.go), which silently skipped token reuse checks when GetTokenID returned an error. ACME and SCEP provisioners always returned errors from GetTokenID, so authorization was never enforced for these provisioner types. The patch also adds serial number verification in the Revoke flow (authority/tls.go). 15 non-test source files were changed, many propagating new sentinel error types and adding context propagation, so the patch is noisy.
